```{=html}
<div style="width:84%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);">

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#3A3950,#2A2940);padding:0.55em 1em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;">
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FF5F56;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#FFBD2E;"></span>
   <span style="width:0.55em;height:0.55em;border-radius:50%;background:#27C93F;"></span>
   <span style="margin:0 auto;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">setup once · link per project</span>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:0.95em 1.2em 1.1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.7;text-align:left;color:#F8F7F0;">
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;"># 1. canonical skill</div>
   <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">mkdir</span> -p <span style="color:#69B4F0;">~/.claude/skills/commit</span></div>
   <div style="margin-bottom:0.6em;"><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> echo <span style="color:#27C93F;">"..."</span> &gt; <span style="color:#69B4F0;">~/.claude/skills/commit/SKILL.md</span></div>

   <div style="color:#5C6B80;"># 2. link from project</div>
   <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">cd</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">~/code/my-project</span></div>
   <div style="margin-bottom:0.6em;"><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">ln</span> -s <span style="color:#69B4F0;">~/.claude/skills/commit</span> <span style="color:#69B4F0;">.claude/skills/commit</span></div>

   <div style="color:#5C6B80;"># 3. don't ship the link</div>
   <div><span style="color:#3DA18A;">$</span> <span style="color:#FFB84D;">echo</span> <span style="color:#27C93F;">".claude/skills/commit"</span> &gt;&gt; <span style="color:#69B4F0;">.gitignore</span></div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;">
  <code style="color:#27C93F;">/commit</code> works here · update once → all linked projects get it
 </div>

</div>
```
